chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 733 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.190/2026 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.7168/2025 (R/Surety) 13.01.2026 Mr. Hajjan Shah, Advocate for applicant / surety. Mr. Gulzar Ahmed Malano, Assistant Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- This application has been filed by the applicant seeking return of surety. As per contentions of learned Counsel, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it appears that accused Sajan was granted interim pre-arrest bail by this Court vide order dated 25.08.2025, subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/-, for which the applicant stood surety by depositing cash amount of Rs.50,000/- vide receipt No.5387 dated 25.08.2025. Thereafter, the bail application of accused was disposed of as not pressed vide order dated 27.10.2025. On the last date of hearing, learned Counsel for the applicant was required to submit certified copy of the supplementary challan as it was claimed that the accused has surrendered before the concerned Court. In response, learned Counsel has filed a statement dated 02.01.2026, whereby certified copies of order dated 30.10.2025, as passed by learned Sessions Judge, Naushahro Feroze rejecting another pre-arrest bail application of the accused, and supplementary challan showing his arrest on 27.11.2025 and the order passed by the concerned Magistrate thereon have been furnished. Learned Assistant P.G., in view of the above position, extends his no objection for granting this application.

In response, learned Counsel has filed a statement dated 02.01.2026, whereby certified copies of order dated 30.10.2025, as passed by learned Sessions Judge, Naushahro Feroze rejecting another pre-arrest bail application of the accused, and supplementary challan showing his arrest on 27.11.2025 and the order passed by the concerned Magistrate thereon have been furnished. Learned Assistant P.G., in view of the above position, extends his no objection for granting this application. Accordingly, the application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety / cash amount to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
